---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work (badges missing, filter broken, layout issue)
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug

**What happened**
A clear description of the problem.

**LinkedIn page**
- URL pattern (redact personal bits): e.g. `/jobs/search/?keywords=…` or
  `/jobs/search-results/?…origin=SEMANTIC_SEARCH_LANDING_PAGE`
- Which layout? Classic board / AI semantic search / not sure

**Did the filter bar appear?** yes / no
**Did badges appear on cards?** yes / no / some

**Console output**
Open DevTools (F12) on the LinkedIn page and paste anything starting with
`[JACF]`, plus any errors. (The repeating `chrome-extension://invalid/` line
is LinkedIn's own anti-bot probe, not this extension — you can ignore it.)
